version_description: A folk-oriented version of Material Girl in G with an alternate melody and inclusion of the intro and post-chorus synth riff.

versions.version_description: Some repeated sections have been cut out, but the chords are more detailed and are complete.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
Folk Guitar Version of Madonna's "Material Girl" in G
For Em7 I recommend using the 020000 chord shape.

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Some boys kiss me, some boys hug me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
I think they're okay[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
If they don't give me proper credit, I just walk away[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
They can beg and they can plead[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
But they can't see the light, that's right[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause the boy with the cold hard cash is always Mister Right[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
You know that we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Some boys romance, some boys slow dance[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
That's all right with me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
If they can't raise my interest, then I have to let them be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Some boys try, and some boys lie[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
But I don't let them play, no way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Only boys that save their pennies make my rainy day[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D6[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
You know that we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
You know that we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]

[Riff]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
-  -  .  .  .  -[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
-  -  .  .    . -[/tab]

(Dashes are 2 beats, dots are 1)

[Interlude]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Living in a material world (-terial)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Living in a material world (-terial)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Boys may come, and boys may go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
And that's all right, you see[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Experience has made me rich, and now they're after me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause everybody's living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]

Living in a material world[/tab]

And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
You know that we are living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]

[Riff]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
-  -  .  .  .  -[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
-  -  .  .    . -[/tab]

(Dashes are 2 beats, dots are 1)

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
A material, a material, a material, a material world[/tab]

Living in a material world[/tab]

Living in a material world (uh uh)
